title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Professional
description: Advanced certification demonstrating expertise in designing distributed systems on AWS, including cost optimization, high availability, and security best practices.

title: First Place - Regional Hackathon
description: Led a team of 4 to develop an AI-powered accessibility tool in 48 hours. Project won first place out of 50+ competing teams for its innovative approach to helping visually impaired users navigate websites.

title: Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer
description: Validated skills in designing, building, and maintaining data processing systems on GCP, including data pipelines, machine learning models, and big data solutions.

title: Open Source Contributor of the Month
description: Recognized by the React community for significant contributions to the React Router project, including performance improvements and accessibility features merged into the core library.

title: MongoDB Certified Developer Associate
description: Certified proficiency in MongoDB development including CRUD operations, indexing strategies, aggregation pipelines, and performance optimization.
